title: nautilocalyx luciani
intro: Nautilocalyx luciani, also known as Luciani's nautilocalyx, is a plant species in the family Boraginaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Nautilocalyx luciani include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Herbal preparations of Nautilocalyx luciani can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often used in folk medicine in certain regions.
